title: 10 Herbal Teas For Hair Fall
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas contains apigenin, linalool, and linalyl acetate, which are active constituents that help with hair fall. Apigenin has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce scalp irritation, which can cause hair loss. Linalool and linalyl acetate have antioxidant properties that protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals. These compounds also help to improve blood circulation to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. By reducing inflammation and pr...
